fields.name: Classic Herb Scrambled Eggs & Toast
fields.short_description: A timeless egg breakfast with creamy scrambled eggs seasoned with fresh herbs, served with buttered whole-grain toast and a side of roasted cherry tomatoes.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk 3 large eggs with a splash of milk, salt, and pepper. Melt a knob of butter in a nonstick pan over medium-low heat, pour in the eggs, and gently stir until soft curds form. Stir in chopped chives and parsley just before finishing. Serve immediately with 2 slices of toasted whole-grain bread lightly buttered and a spoonful of roasted cherry tomatoes (roast halved cherry tomatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper at 425°F/220°C for 8–10 minutes). Optionally add a smear of avocado on the toast for extra creaminess.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides high-quality protein from eggs, B vitamins and choline for brain health, and healthy fats when avocado is included. Whole-grain toast adds complex carbohydrates and fiber. Roasted tomatoes contribute vitamins A and C and antioxidants.

output.reasoning: Appended to Father Day 4 breakfast to provide a classic egg-based option on the same day that includes smoky-themed meals (matches the user's request to add an egg breakfast on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner). Position -1 places it after existing Day 4 breakfast options.
